details: Successfully completed and submitted the application for the AI Engineer position at ioet on behalf of Juan Miguel Jaramillo Gaviria. No login walls, registration requirements, or CAPTCHAs blocked the submission.

pre_drafted_answers.Please describe the most recent project: As AI Development Lead at TopNetworks Inc., I designed and deployed EmailGenius on GCP. Built using Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, and Gemini 2.5 Flash, EmailGenius utilizes advanced prompts and structured JSON outputs for high-throughput AI email generation, incorporating Git Flow for prompt versioning and hallucination risk frameworks to ensure high-quality, high-velocity coding and production-grade delivery.
pre_drafted_answers.Which cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, GCP, A: I have worked extensively with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and Supabase. I consider myself most proficient in Google Cloud Platform (GCP), specifically using services like Cloud Run, Cloud Armor, BigQuery, Compute Engine, and Cloud DNS to deploy scalable, containerized AI services.
pre_drafted_answers.Please tell us about your biggest profes: My biggest professional challenge was architecting and launching the EmailGenius SaaS ecosystem under tight timelines while ensuring near-zero hallucination rates and robust latency profiles for high-throughput operations. By integrating rigorous structured prompt versioning (Git Flow), fine-tuned error handling, and robust caching on Google Cloud Platform, I managed to build a highly available, scalable system that boosted productivity by 46% while ensuring clean, reliable, and consistent AI-generated outputs.
pre_drafted_answers.Why did you choose that option as the be: I chose ownership-driven because, throughout my 17-year career, including co-founding companies and leading AI development, I have always taken full accountability for end-to-end technical delivery and business alignment. I treat every project as if it were my own company, proactively identifying potential bottlenecks, optimizing architecture, and aligning engineering outcomes directly with business goals to deliver high-impact results.
